title: Youtube Poop - Luigi is Pissed
description:
4th Poop. The King has been experimenting with various forms of drugs whilst Luigi goes through spaghetti withdrawal. Meanwhile Mario is being a prick and Zelda refuses to be the King's bitch. Link is a dong.

Music in order of appearance:
Daler Mehndi - Tunak Tunak Tun
Some 70s Sound effect from Kill Bill
Dead or Alive - You Spin Me Right Round

Made using Adobe Premiere.
